title: Ad Astra Extra Vanillified
description: Texture Rewamp for Ad Astra: Extra Additions
body:
Hello! This is a small texture I made cause I wanted my modpack to fit more the minecraft style. With this texture, all items/blocks fit more in the Vanilla Style.

Disclaimer: I'm not saying that the original textures are bad. But some where made with AI, some had resolutions which are not in minecraft's 16x standard, and so I decided to rework them!

This texture is made for: [Ad Astra: Extra Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra-extra-additions)
